heading: About Me
lead: I turn messy data into decisions people can act on.
bio: I spent the past two-plus years working across data engineering, analytics, and dashboarding on finance and AI/ML projects. Day to day, that meant writing SQL, modeling data in Excel, and building Tableau views people actually used. By automating ETL pipelines and putting interactive dashboards in front of decision-makers, I helped surface more than $80K in cost savings and cut data processing time by roughly 35%.

What I enjoy most is the part where analysis turns into a decision. I work closely with stakeholders to understand what they're trying to figure out, then translate the numbers into clear recommendations that move customer and business outcomes in the right direction.
quote: I'm a lifelong learner and innovator, driven by a desire to contribute with new ideas and tools that deliver real value.
